☰

Trustworthy and Reliable

Intelligent Autonomous

Systems

Build a trust foundation, reshape the trust system, enable trust interactions, and embark on the WEB3 trust chapter.
Claim Migration

Trias Layer '-1 ' Trust Network

Build Layer '-1' network through trusted computing to achieve interchain interoperability with multiple Layer 1 chains. Simultaneously, leverage cloud computing technology to expedite the transition from Web2 to Web3.

Link the world with trust

Utilizing a core blockchain solution to establish a reliable infrastructure for trusted interactions, Trias ensures that trust is rooted in machines, steadfastly guaranteeing machines will deterministically 'do what they are instructed to do.'.

Separation of powers model

At its core, with the principle of power separation, it has created a digital ecosystem that promotes fairness and justice for users.

Top-notch technical capability

Through groundbreaking collaboration with Oxford-Octa Digital Economy Lab, we consistently stand at the forefront of the industry.

Enterprise-level Application

Building a comprehensive and trustworthy network ecosystem, leading the new era of digitalization.

Participate in Trias Development

Validator

Participate in the Consensus Mechanism to Provide Solid Support for the Stability of Trias Network Security and Trusted Computing.

Developer

Participate in the Consensus Mechanism to Provide Solid Support for the Stability of Trias Network Security and Trusted Computing.

User

Not only participants, but co-creators of trust as well, promoting prosperity in the trusted computing ecosystem.

Connectors

Enable cross-chain interoperability in the Trias-built ecosystem, driving collaborative growth across blockchains.

Advancing in the Trias Ecosystem

Start from here to explore the endless possibilities of trusted computing.
